timetable.desc: Select the prayer timetable to use for Colombo.

method.label: Calculation Method
method.desc: ACJU follows the All Ceylon Jamiyyathul Ulama. The Old timetable is from the Dept. of Waqf / Majlis.

showCountdown.label: Show countdown
showCountdown.desc: Show a live countdown to the next prayer in the bar instead of the static time.

notifications.desc: Show a desktop notification when each prayer time begins.

calibration.desc: Adjust the displayed Hijri date if it does not match your local moon sighting.

hijriDayOffset.label: Hijri Day Adjustment
hijriDayOffset.desc: Shift the displayed Hijri day if the calculated date does not match local Sri Lanka moon sighting.
